headline: Verizon Shareholder Push Raises Questions On Governance Climate Oversight And Valuation
summary: On April 6, three shareholder proposals were filed at Verizon Communications targeting board structure, climate oversight, and the use of ESG and DEI metrics in executive pay. Verizon responded in its proxy statement by urging investors to vote against all three measures ahead of the upcoming annual meeting. The proposals and proxy advisory scrutiny highlight rising investor focus on governance practices and environmental and social policies at NYSE:VZ. Verizon Communications, trading on...

headline: SBA Communications: Shares Jump On Potential Takeover, But Uncertainty Remains High (Rating Downgrade)
summary: SBAC downgraded to hold amid churn, international headwinds, and takeover uncertainty.
